loginTitle: Your Faculty of Science workspace, ready in one secure sign-in.
loginSubtitle: Assessments, infographics, and research-led learning in one polished platform.
loginCardHint: Use your university Google account to continue.
loginIdleBody: We’ll open your university Google sign-in first, then create a secure workspace session on the server.
loginConfigHint: The web sign-in configuration is still missing in this environment.
loginStatusWorkingBody: Choose the right university account to continue.
loginStatusRedirectingBody: Your browser blocked the popup, so we’re continuing in the next page.
loginStatusFinishingBody: We’re creating your workspace session now.
loginStatusSuccessBody: Your sign-in is verified. We’re taking you in now.
loginStatusConfigTitle: Google sign-in isn’t available here yet
loginStatusConfigBody: Required web sign-in configuration is still missing in this environment.
loginStatusServerBody: The server-side auth runtime needs to finish loading before students can sign in.
loginStatusPopupClosedBody: Open Google sign-in again when you’re ready.
loginStatusPopupCancelledTitle: A sign-in is already in progress
loginStatusPopupCancelledBody: Wait a moment, then try again.
loginStatusRefreshBody: Start Google sign-in again to create a secure session.
loginStatusAdminRequiredTitle: Use the admin entrance for this account
loginStatusAdminRequiredBody: This identity is managed through the dedicated admin login page.
loginStatusGoogleRequiredBody: Regular student access is available through Google sign-in only.
loginStatusSuspendedTitle: This account can’t sign in right now
loginStatusSuspendedBody: Please contact the platform administrator if you need help.
loginStatusBootstrapErrorBody: Your sign-in was received, but the secure session could not be created.
loginStatusNetworkBody: Check your connection and try again. If the problem continues, refresh the page before retrying.
loginStatusGenericErrorBody: Please try again in a moment.
adminLoginIdleBody: Enter your allowlisted email or approved username with your password.
adminLoginRestrictedNotice: Allowlisted accounts with an active Firebase admin claim only.
adminLoginWeakPasswordNotice: Shared-password admin access is temporary. Unique passwords and MFA are strongly recommended.
adminLoginUsernameHint: Use the allowlisted email or its approved username alias.
adminLoginClaimsRunbookNote: Owner setup: create the Firebase Auth account, run `npm run firebase:admin:set-claims`, then sign out and sign back in through /admin/login.
adminLoginConfigHint: The web sign-in configuration for the admin entrance is still missing in this environment.
adminLoginStatusResolvingBody: We’re matching your email or username to an approved admin account.
adminLoginStatusSigningBody: We’re signing you into the protected admin entrance.
adminLoginStatusOpeningBody: Your admin session is being prepared now.
adminLoginStatusSuccessBody: Your admin session is verified. We’re taking you in now.
adminLoginStatusConfigTitle: Admin sign-in isn’t available here yet
adminLoginStatusConfigBody: Required web sign-in configuration is still missing in this environment.
adminLoginStatusServerTitle: Secure admin sign-in is temporarily unavailable
adminLoginStatusServerBody: The server-side admin auth runtime is not ready yet.
adminLoginStatusIdentifierRequiredBody: Enter your allowlisted admin email or approved username to continue.
adminLoginStatusIdentifierNotFoundBody: Use an allowlisted admin email or one of the approved usernames below.
adminLoginStatusUnauthorizedTitle: This account is not approved for admin access
adminLoginStatusUnauthorizedBody: Use an allowlisted admin identity or return to the regular login page.
adminLoginStatusClaimRequiredTitle: Admin claim assignment is still required
adminLoginStatusClaimRequiredBody: This account is allowlisted, but the required server-side `admin: true` claim is not active yet. Have the owner run the admin-claims command, then sign out and sign in again.
adminLoginStatusClaimRefreshTitle: Your admin claim is ready, but this sign-in needs a refresh
adminLoginStatusClaimRefreshBody: The claim exists on the account, but the current sign-in token has not picked it up yet. Wait a few seconds, then sign out and sign in again.
adminLoginStatusPasswordRequiredTitle: Use your admin password to continue
adminLoginStatusPasswordRequiredBody: Admin access is only available through the dedicated email-and-password flow.
adminLoginStatusRecentSigninBody: Refresh your admin sign-in to create a secure session.
adminLoginStatusSuspendedTitle: This admin account is currently unavailable
adminLoginStatusSuspendedBody: Contact the platform owner if you believe this is a mistake.
adminLoginStatusInvalidCredentialsTitle: Check your password and try again
adminLoginStatusInvalidCredentialsBody: We couldn’t verify that admin password.
adminLoginStatusRetryLaterBody: Please wait a moment, then try again.
adminLoginStatusBootstrapErrorTitle: We couldn’t open the admin console
adminLoginStatusBootstrapErrorBody: Your credentials were accepted, but the secure admin session could not be created.
adminLoginStatusNetworkTitle: We couldn’t reach the admin sign-in service
adminLoginStatusNetworkBody: Check your connection and try again. If the problem continues, refresh the page before retrying.
adminLoginStatusGenericErrorBody: Please try again in a moment.
homeSubtitle: Upload course files, generate assessments, and turn dense notes into clean infographic-ready outputs.
assessmentSubtitle: Create structured practice questions from prompts or uploaded materials.
assessmentPromptPlaceholder: Optional: add a topic, emphasis, or constraints. Leave this blank to generate from the linked document.
assessmentPromptHelper: Use this field only when you want to steer focus, tone, or scope beyond the linked document.
assessmentLanguageHint: Keep the assessment language aligned with the class or learner you are preparing for.
assessmentGenerateHint: Lock the core settings first, then generate one reliable assessment pipeline before the future mode split.
assessmentEmpty: No assessment has been generated yet.
assessmentEmptyStateBody: Generate one focused assessment to review the output, metadata, and saved history.
assessmentFormReady: The current assessment request is ready for server-side generation.
assessmentLoadingBody: We’re assembling the prompt, checking document context, and saving a normalized result.
assessmentNoPromptPreview: No prompt preview is available for this assessment yet.
assessmentExportStartingBody: We’re generating the Pro PDF file now, and the download should start automatically.
assessmentExportSuccessBody: Your Pro PDF file is ready and the download has started. If you still want the quick browser print lane, use Fast print / PDF.
assessmentExportFailedBody: We couldn’t generate the Pro PDF file right now. Try again in a moment or use Fast print / PDF.
assessmentLinkReady: Linked document context is ready for generation.
assessmentLinkUnavailable: This linked document is not ready yet. Wait for processing to finish or unlink it.
assessmentReadbackFailed: We couldn’t refresh that saved assessment right now.
assessmentHistoryEmpty: Saved assessments will appear here after the first successful generation.
assessmentFieldGenericError: Assessment generation could not be completed right now.
assessmentFieldSettingsInvalid: Review the assessment inputs and settings, then try again.
assessmentPromptOrDocumentRequired: Add a short prompt or select a linked document before generating.
assessmentFieldDocumentMissing: The linked document could not be found anymore.
assessmentFieldDocumentNotReady: The linked document is still processing. Wait for extraction to finish or remove it from this request.
assessmentFieldDocumentUnavailable: The linked document does not expose a usable generation input for this model yet.
assessmentFieldProviderUnavailable: The selected model runtime is not configured on the server yet.
assessmentFieldProviderExecutionFailed: The selected model could not complete the assessment request right now.
assessmentFieldProviderResponseInvalid: The selected model returned an invalid assessment format.
infographicSubtitle: Turn a topic or extracted document context into a polished infographic blueprint.
infographicEmpty: No infographic has been generated yet.
settingsSubtitle: Complete your account profile, then manage your display and language preferences.
settingsSelfProfileSubtitle: These changes affect your account only and remain server-authoritative.
settingsFullNameHint: Use your full 4-part name in Arabic or English. Extra spaces are normalized automatically.
settingsUniversityCodeHint: University code must be exactly 7 digits, and the first 2 digits must be a cohort prefix from 13 through 31 (2013-2031).
profileCompletionRequiredTitle: Complete your profile to unlock the platform
profileCompletionRequiredDetail: Google sign-in is complete, but the protected workspace stays locked until your full name and university code are validated and stored.
profileCompletionEditTitle: Keep your required profile details up to date
profileCompletionEditSubtitle: These fields remain the server-authoritative profile record for access to the protected user workspace.
profileCompletionRequiredNotice: Complete your full name and university code in Settings before accessing the rest of the protected platform.
profileCompletionSaveFailed: Unable to save your profile right now.
profileCompletionAdminExemptTitle: Admin accounts are exempt from this user profile gate
profileCompletionAdminExemptBody: Admin access remains claim-based and server-authoritative. This mandatory full-name and university-code gate applies only to non-admin user routes.
adminSubtitle: Monitor user activity, role assignment, and simplified platform health.
adminActivitySubtitle: Claims-safe login, upload, assessment, export, and cleanup events.
adminNoActivity: No platform activity has been recorded yet.
adminUsersSubtitle: Review all platform accounts, profile state, roles, and access status.
uploadHint: Supported: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, XLS, TXT, CSV, PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP up to 50MB.
documentContextManageHelp: Use Upload to add or refresh a document, then return here for generation.
firebaseUnavailable: The secure server-side sign-in service is not ready yet.
localFallbackNotice: This environment can still render the new App Router shell and non-secret flows while server integrations are being finished.
homeHallOfHonorTitle: Honor the names behind Zootopia Club
homeHallOfHonorBody: Visit the public Hall of Honor page to see the full tribute hierarchy and leadership recognition.
uploadPageTitle: Start from your document intake workspace
uploadPageSubtitle: This upload-first page keeps the strongest part of the older Zootopia flow: bring in the lecture file once, then branch into assessment and infographic work from one protected workspace.
uploadPageFlowBody: Keep your source document centralized here, then continue into assessment or infographic generation when the file is ready.
uploadPageLatestUploadEmpty: Your next uploaded file will appear here as the active starting point for the rest of the workspace.
uploadPageQuickActionsSubtitle: Once a file is in place, jump straight into the tool that should use it next.
uploadPageWorkspaceDetail: Use this dedicated upload page to register a document before moving into assessment or infographic generation.
uploadContinueBody: This file is still the active workspace source, so you can move straight into generation without relinking it.
uploadRemoveActiveConfirm: Remove this active file from the current workspace?
uploadRemoveActiveFailed: We couldn’t remove the active file right now.
assessmentUnavailableBody: This assessment result could not be found for your account anymore.
assessmentExpiredBody: Saved assessment results stay available for 3 days. This one has already expired.
historyIntro: Review your uploaded files, generated assessments, retained exports, and cleanup actions from one server-authoritative workspace history.
historyUploadsHeading: Uploaded files still tied to your workspace
historyUploadsEmpty: No active uploaded files are still retained for this workspace.
infographicLockedTitle: Infographic Studio is being prepared for the student workspace.
infographicLockedBody: This route stays visible as a polished preview surface, but non-admin users should continue through Upload and Assessment while infographic access remains admin-only.
noDocuments: No documents have been uploaded yet.
noUsers: No signed-in users are available yet.
uploadDropzoneTitle: Drag and drop files here, or
uploadDropzoneFormats: Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, CSV, PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 50 MB
